name: suica-mf-forwarder
description: Parse Mobile Suica balance PDFs into Money Forward-ready transaction candidates.

scripts.provision:kv: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler kv namespace create SUICA_MF_KV
scripts.provision:kv-preview: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler kv namespace create SUICA_MF_KV --preview
scripts.provision:r2: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler r2 bucket create suica-pdfs
scripts.provision:r2-preview: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler r2 bucket create suica-pdfs-preview
